##RRUFFID=R150061
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_2_Fe^3+^_3_O_2_(AsO_4_)_3_·3H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Las Animas mine, La Mur, Sonora, Mexico
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Dark red platy crystals, associated with bright red granular or prismatic sewardite (R060720)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
